list.name: Circuit Breaker Trips
list.rawQuery: SELECT time AS time, client_id AS text FROM request_events WHERE status = 'circuit_open' AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time

targets.rawSql: SELECT time_bucket('1 minute', bucket) AS time, SUM(total_requests) / 60.0 AS rps FROM request_metrics_1m WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT time_bucket('1 minute', bucket) AS time, SUM(rejected)::float / NULLIF(SUM(total_requests), 0) * 100 AS rejection_pct FROM request_metrics_1m WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT client_id, SUM(total_requests) AS total FROM request_metrics_1m WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket) GROUP BY client_id ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT client_id, SUM(rejected) AS rejections, ROUND(SUM(rejected)::numeric / NULLIF(SUM(total_requests), 0) * 100, 1) AS rejection_pct FROM request_metrics_1m WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket) GROUP BY client_id ORDER BY rejections DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT time_bucket('1 minute', bucket) AS time, MAX(p99_latency_ms) AS p99 FROM request_metrics_1m WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT endpoint, SUM(total_requests) AS total FROM request_metrics_1m WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket) GROUP BY endpoint ORDER BY total DESC
